name: greenhaven
description: Greenhaven game runtime, desktop build, web server, web UI, cartridge tools, and bundled demo worlds.

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:server && npm run build:ui && npm run build:desktop && npm run build:forge
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix packages/shared run typecheck && npm --prefix packages/web-server run typecheck && npm --prefix packages/cartridge-forge run typecheck && npm --prefix packages/web-ui run build && npm --prefix packages/desktop-electron run build:ts-only
scripts.prepare:greenhaven-cartridge: npm --prefix packages/web-server run cartridge:default:build -- --no-fail-on-warnings && npm --prefix packages/web-server run cartridge:i18n:check
scripts.prepare:greenhaven-desktop-assets: npm --prefix packages/web-server run build && npm --prefix packages/web-ui run build && npm --prefix packages/desktop-electron run prepare:assets
scripts.build:greenhaven-desktop:raw: npm --prefix packages/web-server run build && npm --prefix packages/web-ui run build && npm --prefix packages/desktop-electron run build
scripts.build:greenhaven-desktop: npm run prepare:greenhaven-cartridge && npm run build:greenhaven-desktop:raw
scripts.dist:greenhaven-win: npm run prepare:greenhaven-cartridge && npm run dist:greenhaven-win:raw
scripts.dist:greenhaven-win-dir: npm run prepare:greenhaven-cartridge && npm run dist:greenhaven-win-dir:raw
